narrative:
Wheeling Township has 1,163 registered voters, with 59.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.1%, a clear Republican lean of 6.5 percentage points.
